original_prompt:
A 4x4 icon contact sheet for 'Wodouyao', a dark-mode desktop terminal multiplexer app. Pure #1a1b26 navy background, 16 flat minimalist geometric icons arranged in a clean grid with thin #292e42 dividers between cells. Each icon is 128px centered. Tokyo Night palette: accent blue #7aa2f7, green #9ece6a, orange #ff9e64, pink #f7768e, purple #bb9af7, cyan #7dcfff, off-white #c0caf5. Icons from left-to-right, top-to-bottom (no text labels):
Row 1: (1) 'W' monogram logo in blue rounded square, (2) arrow cursor pointer, (3) dashed rectangle outline, (4) two small dots connected by a curved bezier line.
Row 2: (5) stylized asterisk star in orange, (6) hex diamond shape in green, (7) outlined cyan diamond, (8) white terminal block cursor rectangle.
Row 3: (9) solid green dot with pulse ring, (10) gray circle with X, (11) lightning bolt in yellow, (12) two vertical pause bars.
Row 4: (13) three dots with parallax motion streaks (starfield), (14) two overlapping sine waves in purple, (15) three simplified figure silhouettes grouped (teams), (16) gear cog with six teeth.
Consistent thin 2px strokes, flat vector style, subtle soft glow behind each icon in its accent color. No text, no labels, no captions. Professional UI icon set.
